scripts.dev: bash -c 'pkill -f "next dev" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; for p in $(lsof -ti :3000 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$p" 2>/dev/null; done; sleep 0.3; NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 exec next dev --webpack'
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.port:free: bash -c 'pkill -f "next dev" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; for p in $(lsof -ti :3000 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$p" 2>/dev/null; done; echo port-3000-free'
